metaTitle: Shipping & Delivery — Nationwide Slot Machine Freight
metaDescription: How we ship slot machines: insured pallet freight, 5-10 business day transit nationwide, liftgate residential delivery available. Full shipping details.
title: Insured freight. Straight to your driveway.
subtitle: Every machine ships from our Kingman, AZ warehouse on a wooden pallet, shrink-wrapped with corner protection, and fully insured for the replacement value.

sections.heading: How we ship
bullets: Machines are palletized, strapped, and corner-protected
Fully insured for the purchase price
Tracking provided within 24 hours of pickup
Photos of the packaged machine before it leaves the bay

sections.heading: Transit times
paragraphs: Shipping origin: our warehouse in Kingman, Arizona (see Site Settings for the exact address).
bullets: Arizona / Nevada / Utah / New Mexico: 2–4 business days
West Coast (CA, OR, WA): 3–5 business days

sections.heading: What to expect on delivery day
paragraphs: The freight carrier will call 24 hours before arrival to schedule a delivery window. Standard terminal-to-terminal freight delivers to the back of the truck at your curb — bring a friend or choose our liftgate option so the pallet lowers to ground level. Open the shrink wrap and confirm no visible damage before signing. If there's any damage, refuse the delivery or note it on the bill of lading — we'll handle the claim.

sections.heading: Inside delivery / upstairs
paragraphs: Freight carriers do not move machines inside your home. You'll need a friend, dolly, or local moving service to roll the ~250 lb machine into place. Upstairs delivery is possible but requires two strong people.

sections.heading: International shipping
paragraphs: We ship internationally by quote. Email our sales team (see Site Settings) with your delivery country, city, and the machine model you want — we'll coordinate a freight quote with customs paperwork.
